3302880.name: Curry Princess GOLD
3302880.description:
／

Visuals: Pixel Art × Modern Effects

Sound: Chiptune-inspired sounds × Acoustic elements

＼

In the Curry Kingdom, spices fall from the sky.

Collect spices and cook delicious curry.

Curry Princess Gold is a Casual Action game where you collect falling spices, earn gold, and cook delicious curry.

It supports both Single player and Local Multiplayer, with three distinct game modes:

Story Mode (Single player)

A single player mode designed for relaxed but engaging play.

Progress through stage-based levels, discovering small episodes and story moments with the characters you meet along the way.

Two-Player Mode (Local Multiplayer)

A local two-player mode for playing together on the same system.

You can choose to:

  • Compete against each other for victory, or

  • Cooperate to overcome the Curry Master’s trials

Play casually with friends or take things a bit more seriously — both styles are supported.

Classic Mode (Single player)

Tags: Casual / Action / Score Attack

An endless score-attack mode focused on high scores.

Play the original Curry Princess, first released for iOS and Android in 2018.

The mobile version is no longer available, so this package is the only place where you can play Curry Princess today!

Basic Rules

Collect spices of the same color consecutively → Chain

Press the attack button once during a Chain → Preparation Mode

In Preparation Mode, a cursor moves to help you choose your position.

Press the attack button again at your own timing → Cast a spell

The effects of magic vary depending on the spice color and the length of the chain.

Play for high scores — or aim for the fastest clear.

Leaderboards are available for each mode, supporting score-based and speed-based playstyles.

There’s also the Curry Book, a small in-game collection of lore and notes for players who want to explore the world a bit more.
